query:
-- Get remaining rows
SELECT 
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(s.monthlyCost,0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue ASC
LIMIT 20 OFFSET 10;

SELECT

  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(s.monthlyCost,0) * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue ASC
LIMIT 20 OFFSET 10;
